validation_command: python -c "import pathlib,re; ar_dir=pathlib.Path('docs/hbtrack/ars'); idx_path=pathlib.Path('docs/hbtrack/_INDEX.md'); files=[f for f in ar_dir.rglob('AR_*.md') if '_INDEX' not in f.name]; ar_ids=set(); [ar_ids.add(m.group(1)) for f in files for m in [re.match(r'AR_([0-9]{3}(?:\.[0-9]+)?[A-Za-z]?)',f.name)] if m]; idx=idx_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'Auto-gerado' in idx,'FAIL: _INDEX.md nao e auto-gerado ou foi editado manualmente'; missing=[i for i in sorted(ar_ids) if f'AR_{i}' not in idx]; assert not missing,f'FAIL: ARs ausentes no index: {missing}'; idx_ids=set(m.group(1) for l in idx.splitlines() for m in [re.match(r'\| AR_([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]+)?[A-Za-z]?) ',l)] if m); assert len(idx_ids)==len(ar_ids),f'FAIL: index tem {len(idx_ids)} ARs mas disco tem {len(ar_ids)} ARs'; print(f'PASS: _INDEX.md completo - {len(ar_ids)} ARs sincronizados')"
